name: CLIFTON TERELLE MCNEILL, PETITIONER v. UNITED STATES
question_presented: Memorization-check set: predict the Supreme Court's disposition in CLIFTON TERELLE MCNEILL, PETITIONER v. UNITED STATES (563 U.S. 816, 2010 Term).
facts_summary: Historical case in the memorization-check arm. By design, only the case name, citation, and term are provided — this arm measures recall of memorized outcomes, not reasoning.
